---
title: "marpoly workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{marpoly workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(marpoly)
```

This vignette demonstrates a complete MAR identification workflow.

```{r}
sim <- marpoly_simulate(
  n = 500,
  causal = 0.20,
  noncausal = 0.70,
  dist = "skewt",
  df = 20,
  gamma = 1.5,
  seed = 123
)
```

Select the pseudo-causal AR order.

```{r}
sel <- marpoly_select_p(sim$x, p_max = 4)
sel
```

Estimate and rank root allocations using the spectrum and bispectrum.

```{r}
fit <- marpoly_fit(sim$x, p = 2, orders = c(2, 3), grid_size = 20)
summary(fit)
```

Extract residuals and check remaining dependence.

```{r}
e <- marpoly_errors(fit)
marpoly_diagnostics(e, powers = c(1, 2), lag.max = 20)
```
